generation_distribution.query:
SELECT p.name_first, p.name_last, s.salary
FROM salary s
JOIN player p ON p.player_id = s.player_id
WHERE s.year = 2015
ORDER BY s.salary DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT p.name_first, p.name_last, s.salary
FROM salary s
JOIN player p ON p.player_id = s.player_id
WHERE s.year = 2015
  AND s.salary = (SELECT MAX(salary) FROM salary WHERE year = 2015);

SELECT s.player_id, s.salary
FROM salary s
WHERE s.year = 2015
ORDER BY s.salary DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT p.name_first, p.name_last, MAX(s.salary) AS max_salary
FROM salary s
JOIN player p ON p.player_id = s.player_id
WHERE s.year = 2015
GROUP BY p.player_id, p.name_first, p.name_last
ORDER BY max_salary DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH max_sal AS (
  SELECT MAX(salary) AS mx
  FROM salary
  WHERE year = 2015
)
SELECT p.name_first, p.name_last, s.salary
FROM salary s
JOIN max_sal m ON s.salary = m.mx
JOIN player p ON p.player_id = s.player_id
WHERE s.year = 2015;
SELECT player_id FROM salary WHERE year = "2015" ORDER BY salary DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT AVG(CAST(p.weight AS REAL)) AS avg_weight
FROM player_award pa
JOIN player p ON p.player_id = pa.player_id
WHERE pa.award_id = 'TSN All-Star' AND (pa.notes = 'Third-Base Man' OR pa.award_id LIKE '%Third-Base Man%');

SELECT AVG(CAST(p.weight AS INTEGER)) AS avg_weight
FROM player_award pa
JOIN player p ON p.player_id = pa.player_id
WHERE pa.award_id LIKE '%TSN%' AND pa.award_id LIKE '%All-Star%' AND pa.award_id LIKE '%Third-Base Man%';

SELECT AVG(CAST(p.weight AS REAL)) AS avg_weight
FROM (
  SELECT DISTINCT pa.player_id
  FROM player_award pa
  WHERE pa.award_id = 'Third-Base Man' AND pa.notes LIKE '%TSN%' AND pa.notes LIKE '%All-Star%'
) x
JOIN player p ON p.player_id = x.player_id
WHERE p.weight IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(p.weight) <> '';

SELECT AVG(CAST(p.weight AS REAL)) AS avg_weight
FROM player_award pa
JOIN player p ON p.player_id = pa.player_id
WHERE pa.award_id = 'Third-Base Man' AND pa.notes LIKE '%TSN All-Star%';

SELECT AVG(p.weight) AS avg_weight
FROM player_award pa
JOIN player p ON p.player_id = pa.player_id
WHERE pa.award_id = 'TSN All-Star Third-Base Man';
SELECT avg(T1.weight) FROM player as T1 JOIN player_award as T2 ON T1.player_id = T2.player_id WHERE T2.award_id = "TSN All-Star" AND notes = "3B"

SELECT birth_city, COUNT(*) AS player_count
FROM player
GROUP BY birth_city
ORDER BY player_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT birth_city, COUNT(*) AS player_count
FROM player
WHERE birth_city IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(birth_city) <> ''
GROUP BY birth_city
ORDER BY player_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH city_counts AS (
  SELECT birth_city, COUNT(*) AS player_count
  FROM player
  WHERE birth_city IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY birth_city
), ranked AS (
  SELECT *, DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY player_count DESC) AS rnk
  FROM city_counts
)
SELECT birth_city, player_count
FROM ranked
WHERE rnk = 1;

SELECT birth_city
FROM player
GROUP BY birth_city
HAVING COUNT(*) = (
  SELECT MAX(cnt)
  FROM (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM player
    GROUP BY birth_city
  ) t
);

SELECT p.birth_city, COUNT(DISTINCT p.player_id) AS player_count
FROM player p
WHERE p.birth_city IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY p.birth_city
ORDER BY player_count DESC
FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY;
SELECT birth_city FROM player GROUP BY birth_city ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(*) AS num_players
FROM (
  SELECT player_id
  FROM player_award
  GROUP BY player_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 10
) t;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT player_id) AS num_players
FROM player_award
GROUP BY player_id
HAVING COUNT(*) > 10;

WITH award_counts AS (
  SELECT player_id, COUNT(*) AS award_wins
  FROM player_award
  GROUP BY player_id
)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS num_players
FROM award_counts
WHERE award_wins > 10;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS num_players
FROM (
  SELECT pa.player_id
  FROM player_award pa
  JOIN player p ON p.player_id = pa.player_id
  GROUP BY pa.player_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 10
) x;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS num_players
FROM (
  SELECT player_id
  FROM player_award
  GROUP BY player_id
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT award_id) > 10
) t;
SELECT count(*) FROM (SELECT player_id FROM player_award GROUP BY player_id HAVING count(*) > 10)

SELECT p.position
FROM player p
JOIN hall_of_fame h ON h.player_id = p.player_id
WHERE p.player_id = 'willite01';
SELECT 'Position not available in schema' AS defense_position;
SELECT DISTINCT notes FROM player_award WHERE player_id = "willite01"

SELECT league_id
FROM player_award
WHERE year = 2006
GROUP BY league_id
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT league_id
FROM player_award
WHERE year = 2006
GROUP BY league_id
ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT player_id) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT league_id
FROM player_award_vote
WHERE year = 2006
GROUP BY league_id
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT league_id, COUNT(*) AS awards_count
FROM player_award
WHERE year = 2006
GROUP BY league_id
QUALIFY DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) = 1;

SELECT pa.league_id
FROM player_award pa
WHERE pa.year = 2006 AND COALESCE(pa.tie,'N') = 'N'
GROUP BY pa.league_id
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;
SELECT league_id FROM player_award WHERE year = "2006" GROUP BY league_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

WITH hof AS (
  SELECT player_id,
         MAX(CASE WHEN inducted = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS inducted_flag
  FROM hall_of_fame
  GROUP BY player_id
), by_month AS (
  SELECT p.birth_month,
         AVG(hof.inducted_flag * 1.0) AS induction_rate,
         COUNT(*) AS total_players
  FROM player p
  LEFT JOIN hof ON hof.player_id = p.player_id
  WHERE p.birth_month IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(p.birth_month) <> ''
  GROUP BY p.birth_month
)
SELECT birth_month
FROM by_month
ORDER BY induction_rate DESC, total_players DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT p.birth_month
FROM player p
LEFT JOIN hall_of_fame h ON h.player_id = p.player_id
WHERE p.birth_month IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(p.birth_month) <> ''
GROUP BY p.birth_month
ORDER BY (SUM(CASE WHEN h.inducted = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT p.player_id), 0) DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH inducted_players AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT player_id
  FROM hall_of_fame
  WHERE inducted = 'Y'
)
SELECT p.birth_month
FROM player p
JOIN inducted_players i ON i.player_id = p.player_id
WHERE p.birth_month IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(p.birth_month) <> ''
GROUP BY p.birth_month
ORDER BY COUNT(*) * 1.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inducted_players) DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH hof AS (
  SELECT player_id,
         MAX(CASE WHEN inducted = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS inducted_flag
  FROM hall_of_fame
  WHERE category = 'Player'
  GROUP BY player_id
)
SELECT p.birth_month
FROM player p
LEFT JOIN hof ON hof.player_id = p.player_id
WHERE p.birth_month IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(p.birth_month) <> ''
GROUP BY p.birth_month
ORDER BY AVG(COALESCE(hof.inducted_flag, 0) * 1.0) DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH hof AS (
  SELECT player_id,
         MAX(CASE WHEN inducted = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS inducted_flag
  FROM hall_of_fame
  WHERE votedby = 'BBWAA'
  GROUP BY player_id
)
SELECT p.birth_month
FROM player p
LEFT JOIN hof ON hof.player_id = p.player_id
WHERE p.birth_month IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(p.birth_month) <> ''
GROUP BY p.birth_month
ORDER BY AVG(COALESCE(hof.inducted_flag, 0) * 1.0) DESC
LIMIT 1;
SELECT T1.birth_month FROM player as T1 JOIN hall_of_fame as T2 ON T1.player_id = T2.player_id WHERE T2.inducted = "Y" GROUP BY T1.birth_month ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT p.player_id, p.name_first, p.name_last, pav.points_won AS score
FROM player_award_vote pav
JOIN player p ON p.player_id = pav.player_id
WHERE pav.year = 1971
ORDER BY pav.points_won DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT p.player_id, p.name_first, p.name_last, CAST(h.votes AS INTEGER) AS score
FROM hall_of_fame h
JOIN player p ON p.player_id = h.player_id
WHERE h.yearid = 1971
ORDER BY CAST(h.votes AS INTEGER) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT player_id, points_won AS score
FROM player_award_vote
WHERE year = 1971
ORDER BY points_won DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT p.player_id, p.name_first, p.name_last, pav.points_won AS score
FROM (
  SELECT player_id, points_won,
         DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY points_won DESC) AS rnk
  FROM player_award_vote
  WHERE year = 1971
) pav
JOIN player p ON p.player_id = pav.player_id
WHERE pav.rnk = 1;

SELECT p.player_id, p.name_first, p.name_last, s.salary AS score
FROM salary s
JOIN player p ON p.player_id = s.player_id
WHERE s.year = 1971
ORDER BY s.salary DESC
LIMIT 1;
SELECT player_id FROM player_award_vote WHERE year = "1971" ORDER BY points_won DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT p.weight AS position, COUNT(DISTINCT h.player_id) AS hof_players
FROM player_award a
JOIN hall_of_fame h ON h.player_id = a.player_id
JOIN player p ON p.player_id = a.player_id
WHERE h.inducted = 'Y'
GROUP BY p.weight
ORDER BY hof_players DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT p.birth_state AS position, COUNT(DISTINCT h.player_id) AS hof_players
FROM player_award a
JOIN hall_of_fame h ON h.player_id = a.player_id
JOIN player p ON p.player_id = a.player_id
WHERE h.inducted = 'Y'
GROUP BY p.birth_state
ORDER BY hof_players DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT p.weight AS position, COUNT(DISTINCT p.player_id) AS hof_players
FROM player p
JOIN hall_of_fame h ON h.player_id = p.player_id
WHERE h.inducted = 'Y'
GROUP BY p.weight
ORDER BY hof_players DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH award_winners AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT player_id
  FROM player_award
), hof_inductees AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT player_id
  FROM hall_of_fame
  WHERE inducted = 'Y'
)
SELECT p.weight AS position, COUNT(*) AS hof_players
FROM award_winners aw
JOIN hof_inductees hi ON hi.player_id = aw.player_id
JOIN player p ON p.player_id = aw.player_id
GROUP BY p.weight
ORDER BY hof_players DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT h.category AS position, COUNT(DISTINCT h.player_id) AS hof_players
FROM player_award a
JOIN hall_of_fame h ON h.player_id = a.player_id
WHERE h.inducted = 'Y'
GROUP BY h.category
ORDER BY hof_players DESC
LIMIT 1;
SELECT T2.notes FROM hall_of_fame as T1 JOIN player_award as T2 ON T1.player_id = T2.player_id WHERE T1.inducted = "Y" GROUP BY notes ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT h.category AS position, AVG(CAST(p.weight AS REAL)) AS avg_weight
FROM player_award pa
JOIN hall_of_fame h ON h.player_id = pa.player_id
JOIN player p ON p.player_id = pa.player_id
GROUP BY h.category
ORDER BY h.category;

SELECT pa.award_id AS position, AVG(CAST(p.weight AS REAL)) AS avg_weight
FROM player_award pa
JOIN player p ON p.player_id = pa.player_id
GROUP BY pa.award_id
ORDER BY pa.award_id;

SELECT h.category AS position, AVG(CAST(p.weight AS REAL)) AS avg_weight
FROM hall_of_fame h
JOIN player p ON p.player_id = h.player_id
WHERE h.inducted = 'Y'
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM player_award pa WHERE pa.player_id = h.player_id)
GROUP BY h.category
ORDER BY h.category;

SELECT p.position, AVG(CAST(p.weight AS REAL)) AS avg_weight
FROM player_award pa
JOIN player p ON p.player_id = pa.player_id
GROUP BY p.position
ORDER BY p.position;
SELECT avg(T1.weight) FROM player as T1 JOIN player_award as T2 ON T1.player_id = T2.player_id GROUP BY notes

SELECT AVG(CAST(p.death_year AS INTEGER) - CAST(p.birth_year AS INTEGER)) AS avg_lifespan_years
FROM (SELECT DISTINCT player_id FROM hall_of_fame WHERE inducted = 'Y') h
JOIN player p ON p.player_id = h.player_id
WHERE p.birth_year IS NOT NULL AND p.death_year IS NOT NULL;

SELECT AVG(CAST(p.death_year AS INTEGER) - CAST(p.birth_year AS INTEGER)) AS avg_lifespan_years
FROM (SELECT DISTINCT player_id FROM hall_of_fame) h
JOIN player p ON p.player_id = h.player_id
WHERE p.birth_year IS NOT NULL AND p.death_year IS NOT NULL;

SELECT AVG(COALESCE(CAST(p.death_year AS INTEGER), EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)) - CAST(p.birth_year AS INTEGER)) AS avg_lifespan_years
FROM (SELECT DISTINCT player_id FROM hall_of_fame WHERE inducted = 'Y') h
JOIN player p ON p.player_id = h.player_id
WHERE p.birth_year IS NOT NULL;

SELECT AVG(CAST(p.death_year AS INTEGER) - CAST(p.birth_year AS INTEGER)) AS avg_lifespan_years
FROM hall_of_fame h
JOIN player p ON p.player_id = h.player_id
WHERE h.inducted = 'Y'
  AND p.birth_year IS NOT NULL AND p.death_year IS NOT NULL;

SELECT AVG(
         (julianday(printf('%04d-%02d-%02d', CAST(p.death_year AS INTEGER), CAST(p.death_month AS INTEGER), CAST(p.death_day AS INTEGER))) -
          julianday(printf('%04d-%02d-%02d', CAST(p.birth_year AS INTEGER), CAST(p.birth_month AS INTEGER), CAST(p.birth_day AS INTEGER))))
         / 365.25
       ) AS avg_lifespan_years
FROM (SELECT DISTINCT player_id FROM hall_of_fame WHERE inducted = 'Y') h
JOIN player p ON p.player_id = h.player_id
WHERE p.birth_year IS NOT NULL AND p.birth_month IS NOT NULL AND p.birth_day IS NOT NULL
  AND p.death_year IS NOT NULL AND p.death_month IS NOT NULL AND p.death_day IS NOT NULL;
SELECT avg(T1.death_year - T1.birth_year) FROM player as T1 JOIN hall_of_fame as T2 ON T1.player_id = T2.player_id WHERE T2.inducted = "Y"

SELECT s.team_id,
       COUNT(DISTINCT h.player_id) AS hof_players
FROM salary s
JOIN hall_of_fame h
  ON h.player_id = s.player_id
WHERE h.inducted = 'Y'
GROUP BY s.team_id
ORDER BY hof_players DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT s.team_id,
       COUNT(DISTINCT s.player_id) AS hof_players
FROM salary s
WHERE s.player_id IN (
  SELECT player_id
  FROM hall_of_fame
  WHERE inducted = 'Y'
)
GROUP BY s.team_id
ORDER BY hof_players DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT s.team_id,
       COUNT(*) AS hof_player_team_rows
FROM salary s
JOIN hall_of_fame h
  ON h.player_id = s.player_id
WHERE h.inducted = 'Y'
GROUP BY s.team_id
ORDER BY hof_player_team_rows DESC
LIMIT 10;

WITH hof AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT player_id
  FROM hall_of_fame
  WHERE inducted = 'Y'
), player_teams AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT s.player_id, s.team_id
  FROM salary s
)
SELECT pt.team_id,
       COUNT(*) AS hof_players
FROM player_teams pt
JOIN hof
  ON hof.player_id = pt.player_id
GROUP BY pt.team_id
ORDER BY hof_players DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT s.team_id,
       COUNT(DISTINCT h.player_id) AS hof_players
FROM salary s
JOIN hall_of_fame h
  ON h.player_id = s.player_id
GROUP BY s.team_id
ORDER BY hof_players DESC
LIMIT 10;
SELECT T2.team_id FROM hall_of_fame as T1 JOIN salary as T2 ON T1.player_id = T2.player_id AND T1.yearid = T2.year WHERE T1.inducted = "Y" GROUP BY T2.team_id ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT award_id, player_id, name_first, name_last, birth_year
FROM (
  SELECT pa.award_id,
         p.player_id,
         p.name_first,
         p.name_last,
         CAST(p.birth_year AS INTEGER) AS birth_year,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
           PARTITION BY pa.award_id
           ORDER BY CAST(p.birth_year AS INTEGER) ASC, p.player_id
         ) AS rn
  FROM player_award pa
  JOIN player p ON p.player_id = pa.player_id
  WHERE p.birth_year IS NOT NULL
) t
WHERE rn = 1;

WITH min_birth AS (
  SELECT pa.award_id, MIN(CAST(p.birth_year AS INTEGER)) AS min_birth_year
  FROM player_award pa
  JOIN player p ON p.player_id = pa.player_id
  WHERE p.birth_year IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY pa.award_id
)
SELECT pa.award_id, p.player_id, p.name_first, p.name_last, CAST(p.birth_year AS INTEGER) AS birth_year
FROM player_award pa
JOIN player p ON p.player_id = pa.player_id
JOIN min_birth mb
  ON mb.award_id = pa.award_id
 AND CAST(p.birth_year AS INTEGER) = mb.min_birth_year
ORDER BY pa.award_id, p.player_id;

SELECT award_id, player_id, name_first, name_last, birth_year
FROM (
  SELECT pa.award_id,
         p.player_id,
         p.name_first,
         p.name_last,
         CAST(p.birth_year AS INTEGER) AS birth_year,
         DENSE_RANK() OVER (
           PARTITION BY pa.award_id
           ORDER BY CAST(p.birth_year AS INTEGER) ASC
         ) AS rnk
  FROM player_award pa
  JOIN player p ON p.player_id = pa.player_id
  WHERE p.birth_year IS NOT NULL
    AND (pa.tie IS NULL OR pa.tie <> 'Y')
) t
WHERE rnk = 1
ORDER BY award_id, player_id;

WITH winners AS (
  SELECT pav.award_id,
         pav.player_id,
         pav.year,
         pav.league_id,
         pav.points_won,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
           PARTITION BY pav.award_id, pav.year, pav.league_id
           ORDER BY pav.points_won DESC, pav.player_id
         ) AS rn
  FROM player_award_vote pav
), award_winner_rows AS (
  SELECT award_id, player_id
  FROM winners
  WHERE rn = 1
)
SELECT award_id, player_id, name_first, name_last, birth_year
FROM (
  SELECT awr.award_id,
         p.player_id,
         p.name_first,
         p.name_last,
         CAST(p.birth_year AS INTEGER) AS birth_year,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
           PARTITION BY awr.award_id
           ORDER BY CAST(p.birth_year AS INTEGER) ASC
         ) AS rn2
  FROM award_winner_rows awr
  JOIN player p ON p.player_id = awr.player_id
  WHERE p.birth_year IS NOT NULL
) x
WHERE rn2 = 1;

SELECT pa.award_id,
       (SELECT p.player_id
        FROM player_award pa2
        JOIN player p ON p.player_id = pa2.player_id
        WHERE pa2.award_id = pa.award_id AND p.birth_year IS NOT NULL
        ORDER BY CAST(p.birth_year AS INTEGER) ASC, p.player_id
        LIMIT 1) AS player_id
FROM player_award pa
GROUP BY pa.award_id;
SELECT T1.player_id, T1.award_id , max(T1.year - T2.birth_year) FROM player_award as T1 JOIN player as T2 ON T1.player_id = T2.player_id GROUP BY T1.award_id

SELECT pa.award_id,
       p.player_id,
       p.name_first,
       p.name_last,
       (pa.year - CAST(p.birth_year AS INTEGER)) AS age_at_award
FROM player_award pa
JOIN player p ON p.player_id = pa.player_id
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
  PARTITION BY pa.award_id
  ORDER BY (pa.year - CAST(p.birth_year AS INTEGER)) ASC, pa.year ASC, p.player_id
) = 1;

WITH ranked AS (
  SELECT pa.award_id,
         pa.player_id,
         p.name_first,
         p.name_last,
         (pa.year - CAST(p.birth_year AS INTEGER)) AS age_at_award,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
           PARTITION BY pa.award_id
           ORDER BY (pa.year - CAST(p.birth_year AS INTEGER)) ASC, pa.year ASC, pa.player_id
         ) AS rn
  FROM player_award pa
  JOIN player p ON p.player_id = pa.player_id
)
SELECT award_id, player_id, name_first, name_last, age_at_award
FROM ranked
WHERE rn = 1;

WITH min_age AS (
  SELECT pa.award_id,
         MIN(pa.year - CAST(p.birth_year AS INTEGER)) AS min_age
  FROM player_award pa
  JOIN player p ON p.player_id = pa.player_id
  GROUP BY pa.award_id
)
SELECT pa.award_id,
       p.player_id,
       p.name_first,
       p.name_last,
       (pa.year - CAST(p.birth_year AS INTEGER)) AS age_at_award
FROM player_award pa
JOIN player p ON p.player_id = pa.player_id
JOIN min_age ma
  ON ma.award_id = pa.award_id
 AND ma.min_age = (pa.year - CAST(p.birth_year AS INTEGER));

WITH ranked AS (
  SELECT pa.award_id,
         pa.player_id,
         p.name_first,
         p.name_last,
         pa.year,
         DENSE_RANK() OVER (
           PARTITION BY pa.award_id
           ORDER BY (pa.year - CAST(p.birth_year AS INTEGER)) ASC
         ) AS dr
  FROM player_award pa
  JOIN player p ON p.player_id = pa.player_id
)
SELECT award_id, player_id, name_first, name_last, year
FROM ranked
WHERE dr = 1;

SELECT pa.award_id,
       p.player_id,
       p.name_first,
       p.name_last
FROM player_award pa
JOIN player p ON p.player_id = pa.player_id
WHERE (pa.award_id, (pa.year - CAST(p.birth_year AS INTEGER))) IN (
  SELECT pa2.award_id,
         MIN(pa2.year - CAST(p2.birth_year AS INTEGER))
  FROM player_award pa2
  JOIN player p2 ON p2.player_id = pa2.player_id
  GROUP BY pa2.award_id
);
SELECT T1.player_id, T1.award_id , min(T1.year - T2.birth_year) FROM player_award as T1 JOIN player as T2 ON T1.player_id = T2.player_id GROUP BY T1.award_id

SELECT p.birth_country, COUNT(DISTINCT h.player_id) AS hof_players
FROM hall_of_fame h
JOIN player p ON p.player_id = h.player_id
WHERE h.inducted = 'Y'
GROUP BY p.birth_country
ORDER BY hof_players DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT p.birth_country, COUNT(*) AS hof_player_rows
FROM hall_of_fame h
JOIN player p ON p.player_id = h.player_id
WHERE h.inducted = 'Y'
GROUP BY p.birth_country
ORDER BY hof_player_rows DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT p.birth_country, COUNT(DISTINCT h.player_id) AS hof_players
FROM hall_of_fame h
JOIN player p ON p.player_id = h.player_id
WHERE h.inducted = 'Y'
  AND p.birth_country IS NOT NULL
  AND TRIM(p.birth_country) <> ''
GROUP BY p.birth_country
ORDER BY hof_players DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT p.birth_country, COUNT(DISTINCT h.player_id) AS hof_players
FROM player p
JOIN hall_of_fame h ON h.player_id = p.player_id
GROUP BY p.birth_country
ORDER BY hof_players DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT p.birth_country, COUNT(DISTINCT h.player_id) AS hof_players
FROM hall_of_fame h
JOIN player p ON p.player_id = h.player_id
WHERE h.inducted = 'Y'

GROUP BY p.birth_country
ORDER BY hof_players DESC
LIMIT 10;

  SELECT Type,
         SUM(CASE WHEN Outcome = 'Investigation complete' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS complete_cnt,

SELECT
  CAST(FLOOR(LATITUDE) AS INT) AS lat_band_start,
  CAST(FLOOR(LATITUDE) AS INT) + 1 AS lat_band_end,
  COUNT(*) AS fire_count
FROM Fires
WHERE LATITUDE IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY CAST(FLOOR(LATITUDE) AS INT)
ORDER BY fire_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  (FLOOR(LATITUDE * 2) / 2.0) AS lat_band_start,
  (FLOOR(LATITUDE * 2) / 2.0) + 0.5 AS lat_band_end,
  COUNT(*) AS fire_count
FROM Fires
WHERE LATITUDE IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY (FLOOR(LATITUDE * 2) / 2.0)
ORDER BY fire_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  (FLOOR(LATITUDE / 5) * 5) AS lat_band_start,
  (FLOOR(LATITUDE / 5) * 5) + 5 AS lat_band_end,
  COUNT(*) AS fire_count
FROM Fires
WHERE LATITUDE IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY (FLOOR(LATITUDE / 5) * 5)
ORDER BY fire_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  CAST(FLOOR(LATITUDE) AS INT) AS lat_band_start,
  CAST(FLOOR(LATITUDE) AS INT) + 1 AS lat_band_end,
  COUNT(*) AS fire_count
FROM Fires
WHERE LATITUDE BETWEEN 24 AND 50
GROUP BY CAST(FLOOR(LATITUDE) AS INT)
ORDER BY fire_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH binned AS (
  SELECT
    WIDTH_BUCKET(LATITUDE, 0, 90, 18) AS bucket,
    LATITUDE
  FROM Fires
  WHERE LATITUDE IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
  (bucket - 1) * 5 AS lat_band_start,
  (bucket - 1) * 5 + 5 AS lat_band_end,
  COUNT(*) AS fire_count
FROM binned
GROUP BY bucket

WITH rev AS (
  SELECT k.State AS state, SUM(f.t_fed_rev) AS total_rev
  FROM FINREV_FED_17 f
  JOIN FINREV_FED_KEY_17 k
    ON k.State_Code = f.state_code
  GROUP BY k.State
), min_state AS (
  SELECT state, total_rev
  FROM rev
  ORDER BY total_rev ASC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT m.state,
       ms.total_rev,
       AVG(m.average_scale_score) AS state_average_score
FROM min_state ms
JOIN NDECoreExcel_Math_Grade8 m
  ON m.state = ms.state
GROUP BY m.state, ms.total_rev;

WITH rev AS (
  SELECT k.State AS state, SUM(f.t_fed_rev) AS total_rev
  FROM FINREV_FED_17 f
  JOIN FINREV_FED_KEY_17 k
    ON k.State_Code = f.state_code
  GROUP BY k.State
), scored AS (
  SELECT state, AVG(average_scale_score) AS avg_score
  FROM NDECoreExcel_Math_Grade8
  GROUP BY state
)
SELECT r.state, r.total_rev, s.avg_score
FROM rev r
JOIN scored s ON s.state = r.state
ORDER BY r.total_rev ASC
LIMIT 1;

WITH rev AS (
  SELECT k.State AS state, SUM(f.t_fed_rev) AS total_rev
  FROM FINREV_FED_17 f
  JOIN FINREV_FED_KEY_17 k
    ON k.State_Code = f.state_code
  GROUP BY k.State
), latest_score AS (
  SELECT state, average_scale_score,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY state ORDER BY year DESC) AS rn
  FROM NDECoreExcel_Math_Grade8
)
SELECT r.state, r.total_rev, ls.average_scale_score AS state_average_score
FROM rev r
JOIN latest_score ls
  ON ls.state = r.state AND ls.rn = 1
ORDER BY r.total_rev ASC
LIMIT 1;

WITH district_min AS (

  FROM FINREV_FED_17 f

)

WITH rev AS (

SELECT T2.state, T3.average_scale_score FROM FINREV_FED_KEY_17 as T2 JOIN FINREV_FED_17 as T1 ON T1.state_code = T2.state_code JOIN NDECoreExcel_Math_Grade8 as T3 ON T2.state = T3.state GROUP BY T2.state ORDER BY sum(T1.t_fed_rev) LIMIT 1

SELECT k.State AS state,
       (r.total_fed_rev / m.average_scale_score) AS revenue_per_score
FROM (
  SELECT state_code, yr_data, SUM(t_fed_rev) AS total_fed_rev
  FROM FINREV_FED_17
  GROUP BY state_code, yr_data
) r
JOIN FINREV_FED_KEY_17 k
  ON k.State_Code = r.state_code
JOIN NDECoreExcel_Math_Grade8 m
  ON m.state = k.State AND m.year = r.yr_data
WHERE m.average_scale_score IS NOT NULL
  AND r.total_fed_rev IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY revenue_per_score ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT r.school_district,
       k.State AS state,
       r.yr_data AS year,
       (r.t_fed_rev / m.average_scale_score) AS revenue_per_score
FROM FINREV_FED_17 r
JOIN FINREV_FED_KEY_17 k
  ON k.State_Code = r.state_code
JOIN NDECoreExcel_Math_Grade8 m
  ON m.state = k.State AND m.year = r.yr_data
WHERE r.t_fed_rev IS NOT NULL
  AND m.average_scale_score IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY revenue_per_score ASC

SELECT k.State AS state,
       (m.average_scale_score / r.total_fed_rev) AS score_per_revenue
FROM (
  SELECT state_code, yr_data, SUM(t_fed_rev) AS total_fed_rev
  FROM FINREV_FED_17
  GROUP BY state_code, yr_data
) r
JOIN FINREV_FED_KEY_17 k
  ON k.State_Code = r.state_code
JOIN NDECoreExcel_Math_Grade8 m
  ON m.state = k.State AND m.year = r.yr_data
WHERE m.average_scale_score IS NOT NULL
  AND r.total_fed_rev > 0
ORDER BY score_per_revenue ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT r.school_district,
       k.State AS state,
       r.yr_data AS year,
       (r.t_fed_rev / m.average_scale_score) AS revenue_per_score
FROM FINREV_FED_17 r
JOIN FINREV_FED_KEY_17 k
  ON k.State_Code = r.state_code

  SELECT year, state, AVG(average_scale_score) AS average_scale_score
  FROM NDECoreExcel_Math_Grade8
  GROUP BY year, state
) m
  ON m.state = k.State AND m.year = r.yr_data
WHERE r.t_fed_rev IS NOT NULL
  AND m.average_scale_score IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY revenue_per_score ASC
LIMIT 1;

WITH rev_by_state AS (

WITH rev_by_state AS (

WITH rev_by_state AS (

 AND m.year = fr.yr_data

WITH state_rev AS (
  SELECT fr.state_code, fr.yr_data, SUM(fr.t_fed_rev) AS total_state_rev
  FROM FINREV_FED_17 fr
  GROUP BY fr.state_code, fr.yr_data
)
SELECT k.State AS state,
       sr.yr_data AS year,
       sr.total_state_rev / m.average_scale_score AS rev_score_ratio
FROM state_rev sr
JOIN FINREV_FED_KEY_17 k
  ON sr.state_code = k.State_Code
JOIN NDECoreExcel_Math_Grade8 m
  ON m.state = k.State
 AND m.year = sr.yr_data
WHERE m.average_scale_score IS NOT NULL

LIMIT 1;

WITH latest_year AS (
  SELECT MAX(year) AS y
  FROM NDECoreExcel_Math_Grade8
), joined AS (
  SELECT fr.school_district,
         fr.t_fed_rev,
         m.average_scale_score
  FROM FINREV_FED_17 fr
  JOIN FINREV_FED_KEY_17 k
    ON fr.state_code = k.State_Code
  JOIN NDECoreExcel_Math_Grade8 m
    ON m.state = k.State
  JOIN latest_year ly
    ON m.year = ly.y AND fr.yr_data = ly.y
)
SELECT school_district,
       t_fed_rev / average_scale_score AS rev_score_ratio
FROM joined
WHERE average_scale_score IS NOT NULL
  AND average_scale_score <> 0
ORDER BY rev_score_ratio DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT fr.school_district,
       fr.t_fed_rev,
       m.average_scale_score,
       (fr.t_fed_rev * 1.0) / NULLIF(m.average_scale_score, 0) AS rev_score_ratio
FROM FINREV_FED_17 fr
JOIN FINREV_FED_KEY_17 k
  ON fr.state_code = k.State_Code
JOIN NDECoreExcel_Math_Grade8 m
  ON m.state = k.State
-- year not joined due to possible mismatch; using overall state score rows
WHERE m.average_scale_score IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY rev_score_ratio DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH state_scores AS (
  SELECT state, AVG(average_scale_score) AS avg_state_score
  FROM NDECoreExcel_Math_Grade8
  GROUP BY state
), base AS (
  SELECT f.school_district,
         k.State AS state,
         f.t_fed_rev,
         f.c14,
         f.c25
  FROM FINREV_FED_17 f
  JOIN FINREV_FED_KEY_17 k
    ON k.State_Code = f.state_code
)
SELECT category, school_district, state, revenue, s.avg_state_score
FROM (
  SELECT 't_fed_rev' AS category, school_district, state, t_fed_rev AS revenue,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY t_fed_rev DESC) AS rn
  FROM base
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'c14' AS category, school_district, state, c14 AS revenue,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY c14 DESC) AS rn
  FROM base
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'c25' AS category, school_district, state, c25 AS revenue,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY c25 DESC) AS rn
  FROM base
) x
JOIN state_scores s
  ON s.state = x.state
WHERE rn = 1;

WITH state_scores AS (
  SELECT state, AVG(average_scale_score) AS avg_state_score
  FROM NDECoreExcel_Math_Grade8
  GROUP BY state
)
SELECT 't_fed_rev' AS category,
       f.school_district,
       k.State AS state,
       f.t_fed_rev AS revenue,
       ss.avg_state_score
FROM FINREV_FED_17 f
JOIN FINREV_FED_KEY_17 k ON k.State_Code = f.state_code
JOIN state_scores ss ON ss.state = k.State
WHERE f.t_fed_rev = (SELECT MAX(t_fed_rev) FROM FINREV_FED_17)
UNION ALL
SELECT 'c14' AS category,
       f.school_district,
       k.State AS state,
       f.c14 AS revenue,
       ss.avg_state_score
FROM FINREV_FED_17 f
JOIN FINREV_FED_KEY_17 k ON k.State_Code = f.state_code
JOIN state_scores ss ON ss.state = k.State
WHERE f.c14 = (SELECT MAX(c14) FROM FINREV_FED_17)
UNION ALL
SELECT 'c25' AS category,
       f.school_district,
       k.State AS state,
       f.c25 AS revenue,
       ss.avg_state_score
FROM FINREV_FED_17 f
JOIN FINREV_FED_KEY_17 k ON k.State_Code = f.state_code
JOIN state_scores ss ON ss.state = k.State
WHERE f.c25 = (SELECT MAX(c25) FROM FINREV_FED_17);

WITH latest_scores AS (
  SELECT state, average_scale_score
  FROM (
    SELECT state, average_scale_score,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY state ORDER BY year DESC) AS rn
    FROM NDECoreExcel_Math_Grade8
  ) t
  WHERE rn = 1
), base AS (
  SELECT f.school_district,
         k.State AS state,
         f.yr_data,
         f.t_fed_rev,
         f.c14,
         f.c25
  FROM FINREV_FED_17 f
  JOIN FINREV_FED_KEY_17 k
    ON k.State_Code = f.state_code
)
SELECT category, school_district, state, revenue, ls.average_scale_score AS latest_state_score
FROM (
  SELECT category, school_district, state, revenue,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY category ORDER BY revenue DESC) AS rn
  FROM (
    SELECT 't_fed_rev' AS category, school_district, state, t_fed_rev AS revenue FROM base
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'c14' AS category, school_district, state, c14 AS revenue FROM base
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'c25' AS category, school_district, state, c25 AS revenue FROM base
  ) u
) ranked
JOIN latest_scores ls
  ON ls.state = ranked.state
WHERE rn = 1;

WITH state_scores AS (
  SELECT state, AVG(average_scale_score) AS avg_state_score
  FROM NDECoreExcel_Math_Grade8
  GROUP BY state
), revenue_long AS (
  SELECT f.school_district,
         k.State AS state,
         't_fed_rev' AS category,
         f.t_fed_rev AS revenue
  FROM FINREV_FED_17 f
  JOIN FINREV_FED_KEY_17 k ON k.State_Code = f.state_code
  UNION ALL
  SELECT f.school_district, k.State, 'c14', f.c14
  FROM FINREV_FED_17 f
  JOIN FINREV_FED_KEY_17 k ON k.State_Code = f.state_code
  UNION ALL
  SELECT f.school_district, k.State, 'c25', f.c25
  FROM FINREV_FED_17 f
  JOIN FINREV_FED_KEY_17 k ON k.State_Code = f.state_code
)
SELECT rl.category, rl.school_district, rl.state, rl.revenue, ss.avg_state_score
FROM revenue_long rl
JOIN (
  SELECT category, MAX(revenue) AS max_rev
  FROM revenue_long
  GROUP BY category
) m
  ON m.category = rl.category AND m.max_rev = rl.revenue
JOIN state_scores ss
  ON ss.state = rl.state;

WITH state_scores_by_year AS (

  FROM NDECoreExcel_Math_Grade8

), base AS (

         k.State AS state,

  FROM FINREV_FED_17 f
  JOIN FINREV_FED_KEY_17 k ON k.State_Code = f.state_code
)
SELECT category, school_district, state, year, revenue, avg_state_score
FROM (
  SELECT category, school_district, state, year, revenue,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY category ORDER BY revenue DESC) AS rn
  FROM (
    SELECT 't_fed_rev' AS category, school_district, state, year, t_fed_rev AS revenue FROM base
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'c14' AS category, school_district, state, year, c14 AS revenue FROM base
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 'c25' AS category, school_district, state, year, c25 AS revenue FROM base
  ) u
) r
LEFT JOIN state_scores_by_year s
  ON s.state = r.state AND s.year = r.year
WHERE rn = 1;

SELECT T1.school_district, max(T1.c14), T3.average_scale_score FROM FINREV_FED_17 as T1 JOIN FINREV_FED_KEY_17 as T2 ON T1.state_code = T2.state_code JOIN NDECoreExcel_Math_Grade8 as T3 ON T2.state = T3.state UNION SELECT T1.school_district, max(T1.c25), T3.average_scale_score FROM FINREV_FED_17 as T1 JOIN FINREV_FED_KEY_17 as T2 ON T1.state_code = T2.state_code JOIN NDECoreExcel_Math_Grade8 as T3 ON T2.state = T3.state

SELECT m.state,
       AVG(m.average_scale_score) AS avg_math_score,
       SUM(f.t_fed_rev) AS total_fed_rev,
       SUM(f.c14) AS total_title1_rev,
       SUM(f.c25) AS total_child_nutrition_rev
FROM NDECoreExcel_Math_Grade8 m
JOIN FINREV_FED_KEY_17 k
  ON k.State = m.state
JOIN FINREV_FED_17 f
  ON f.state_code = k.State_Code
GROUP BY m.state
ORDER BY avg_math_score DESC
LIMIT 10;

WITH latest_math AS (
  SELECT state, MAX(year) AS max_year
  FROM NDECoreExcel_Math_Grade8
  GROUP BY state
), math AS (
  SELECT m.state, m.year, AVG(m.average_scale_score) AS avg_math_score
  FROM NDECoreExcel_Math_Grade8 m
  JOIN latest_math lm
    ON lm.state = m.state AND lm.max_year = m.year
  GROUP BY m.state, m.year
), fin AS (
  SELECT k.State AS state,
         f.yr_data AS year,
         SUM(f.t_fed_rev) AS total_fed_rev,
         SUM(f.c14) AS total_title1_rev,
         SUM(f.c25) AS total_child_nutrition_rev
  FROM FINREV_FED_KEY_17 k
  JOIN FINREV_FED_17 f
    ON f.state_code = k.State_Code
  GROUP BY k.State, f.yr_data
)
SELECT math.state,
       math.year,
       math.avg_math_score,
       fin.total_fed_rev,
       fin.total_title1_rev,
       fin.total_child_nutrition_rev
FROM math
LEFT JOIN fin
  ON fin.state = math.state AND fin.year = math.year
ORDER BY math.avg_math_score DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT m.state,
       AVG(m.average_scale_score) AS avg_math_score,
       AVG(f.t_fed_rev) AS avg_total_fed_rev,
       AVG(f.c14) AS avg_title1_rev,
       AVG(f.c25) AS avg_child_nutrition_rev
FROM NDECoreExcel_Math_Grade8 m
JOIN FINREV_FED_KEY_17 k
  ON k.State = m.state
JOIN FINREV_FED_17 f
  ON f.state_code = k.State_Code
GROUP BY m.state
ORDER BY avg_math_score DESC
LIMIT 10;

WITH math AS (
  SELECT state, AVG(average_scale_score) AS avg_math_score
  FROM NDECoreExcel_Math_Grade8
  GROUP BY state
), fin AS (
  SELECT k.State AS state,
         SUM(f.t_fed_rev) AS total_fed_rev,
         SUM(f.c14) AS total_title1_rev,
         SUM(f.c25) AS total_child_nutrition_rev
  FROM FINREV_FED_KEY_17 k
  JOIN FINREV_FED_17 f
    ON f.state_code = k.State_Code
  GROUP BY k.State
)
SELECT math.state,
       math.avg_math_score,
       fin.total_fed_rev,
       fin.total_title1_rev,
       fin.total_child_nutrition_rev
FROM math
JOIN fin ON fin.state = math.state
ORDER BY math.avg_math_score DESC
LIMIT 10;

WITH latest_year AS (
  SELECT MAX(year) AS y FROM NDECoreExcel_Math_Grade8
), math AS (
  SELECT state, AVG(average_scale_score) AS avg_math_score
  FROM NDECoreExcel_Math_Grade8
  WHERE year = (SELECT y FROM latest_year)
  GROUP BY state
), fin AS (
  SELECT k.State AS state,

         SUM(f.c25) AS total_child_nutrition_rev
  FROM FINREV_FED_KEY_17 k
  JOIN FINREV_FED_17 f
    ON f.state_code = k.State_Code
  GROUP BY k.State
)
SELECT math.state,
       math.avg_math_score,
       fin.total_fed_rev,
       fin.total_title1_rev,
       fin.total_child_nutrition_rev
FROM math
LEFT JOIN fin ON fin.state = math.state

SELECT T2.state, sum(c14),sum(c25) FROM FINREV_FED_17 as T1 JOIN FINREV_FED_KEY_17 as T2 ON T1.state_code = T2.state_code JOIN NDECoreExcel_Math_Grade8 as T3 ON T2.state = T3.state GROUP BY T2.state ORDER BY T3.average_scale_score DESC LIMIT 10
